title: No Background
description: Removes the backgrounds from containers & inventories
body:
# No Background by SVNVZN
This pack removes the background from **all inventories & containers** but unlike most transparent resource packs, it keeps the slots visible.

**Inventories include but not limited to:**
- Survival/Creative Inventory
- Chests
- Crafting Table
- Furnaces
- **& More**
